hasAttributes.name: SLAItemId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the SLA Item.

hasAttributes.name: name
hasAttributes.description: Type a descriptive name of the service level agreement (SLA) item.

hasAttributes.name: owningBusinessUnit
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier for the business unit that owns the record

hasAttributes.name: description
hasAttributes.description: Type additional information to describe the SLA Item

hasAttributes.name: relatedField
hasAttributes.description: Select the service level agreement (SLA) key performance indicator (KPI) that this SLA Item is created for.

hasAttributes.name: SLAId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier for SLA associated with SLA Item.

hasAttributes.name: createdOn
hasAttributes.description: Shows the date and time when the record was created. The date and time are displayed in the time zone selected in Microsoft Dynamics 365 options.

hasAttributes.name: createdBy
hasAttributes.description: Shows who created the record.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOn
hasAttributes.description: Shows the date and time when the record was last updated. The date and time are displayed in the time zone selected in Microsoft Dynamics 365 options.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedBy
hasAttributes.description: Shows who last updated the record.

hasAttributes.name: exchangeRate
hasAttributes.description: Exchange rate between the currency associated with the SLA Item record and the base currency.

hasAttributes.name: versionNumber
hasAttributes.description: Version number of the SLA Item.

hasAttributes.name: transactionCurrencyId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the currency associated with the SLA Item record.

hasAttributes.name: applicableWhenXml
hasAttributes.description: Condition for SLA item

hasAttributes.name: successConditionsXml
hasAttributes.description: Condition for SLA item

hasAttributes.name: solutionId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the associated solution.

hasAttributes.name: componentState
hasAttributes.description: For internal use only.

hasAttributes.name: overwriteTime
hasAttributes.description: For internal use only.

hasAttributes.name: isManaged
hasAttributes.description: For internal use only.

hasAttributes.name: SLAItemIdUnique
hasAttributes.description: For internal use only.

hasAttributes.name: sequenceNumber
hasAttributes.description: Select the time zone, or UTC offset, for this address so that other people can reference it when they contact someone at this address.

hasAttributes.name: failureAfter
hasAttributes.description: Select how soon the success criteria must be met until the SLA item is considered failed and failure actions are initiated. The actual duration is based on the business hours as specified in the associated SLA record.

hasAttributes.name: warnAfter
hasAttributes.description: Select how soon the success criteria must be met before warning actions are initiated. The actual duration is based on the business hours as specified in the associated SLA record.

hasAttributes.name: owningUser
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the user who owns the SLA Item record.

hasAttributes.name: ownerId
hasAttributes.description: Owner Id

hasAttributes.name: ownerIdType
hasAttributes.description: The type of owner, either User or Team.

hasAttributes.name: workflowId
hasAttributes.description: Workflow associated with the SLA Item.

hasAttributes.name: createdOnBehalfBy
hasAttributes.description: Shows who created the record on behalf of another user.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOnBehalfBy
hasAttributes.description: Shows who created the record on behalf of another user.

definitions.description: Contains information about a tracked support KPI for a specific customer.
